name: @elizaos/plugin-nvidiacloud
description: NVIDIA NIM cloud model provider for elizaOS agents.

NVIDIA_API_KEY.description: NVIDIA Build / NGC API key for NIM cloud (integrate.api.nvidia.com).

NVIDIA_CLOUD_API_KEY.description: Alias for NVIDIA_API_KEY when you prefer a cloud-specific name.

NVIDIA_BASE_URL.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for NIM HTTP APIs.

NVIDIA_EMBEDDING_BASE_URL.description: Optional separate base URL for POST /v1/embeddings (defaults to NVIDIA_BASE_URL).

NVIDIA_BROWSER_BASE_URL.description: Browser-only proxy base URL (no API key in the client).

NVIDIA_SMALL_MODEL.description: NIM model id for TEXT_SMALL / OBJECT_SMALL (default: reliable low-latency Llama 3.1 8B Instruct).

NVIDIA_LARGE_MODEL.description: NIM model id for TEXT_LARGE / OBJECT_LARGE (default: high-power Llama 3.1 405B Instruct).

NVIDIA_TEXT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Abort NVIDIA chat/text requests after this many milliseconds.

NVIDIA_SMALL_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Default max output tokens for TEXT_SMALL calls when the caller does not specify one.

NVIDIA_LARGE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Default max output tokens for TEXT_LARGE calls when the caller does not specify one.

SMALL_MODEL.description: Fallback small model when NVIDIA_SMALL_MODEL is unset.

LARGE_MODEL.description: Fallback large model when NVIDIA_LARGE_MODEL is unset.

NVIDIA_EMBEDDING_MODEL.description: Model id for /v1/embeddings. Default nvidia/nv-embedqa-e5-v5 (needs input_type). Alternatives: baai/bge-m3, nvidia/nv-embed-v1.

NVIDIA_EMBEDDING_INPUT_TYPE.description: For nv-embed / nv-embedqa models: passage (indexing, default for memory) or query (retrieval). Ignored for models that do not require input_type.

NVIDIA_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.description: Expected embedding length; must match model output and a core VECTOR_DIMS value.

NVIDIA_EMBEDDING_DEBUG.description: Log sanitized embedding request bodies and NVCF response headers (1/true).
